title: Pithocarpa cordata
taxonomy: Pithocarpa cordata is classified within the plant kingdom. Specifically, it belongs to the family Brassicaceae, which includes other cruciferous plants. Within this family, Pithocarpa cordata can be further classified as belonging to the genus Pithocarpa, which is a small group of Australian plants. The species Pithocarpa cordata is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
